report.summary: Day 70 standup #7: Full rotation completed since v5 (all 6 agents ran). Build-v5 added Solana Blinks + NFTFi guides, community-v4 drafted Morgan Stanley MSBT social campaign, eod-v5 confirmed 1,145 uncommitted files. Git locks at 8 days — zero deploys, zero commits. 431 slugs declared, ~315 in production. 27 agent runs today ($2,319). All priorities unchanged: clear git locks → deploy → halt builds.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE STANDUP v5: Full rotation completed — build-v5, publish-v3, community-v4, design-v4, eod-v5 all ran. No deploys or commits.
BUILD-V5 OUTPUT: 2 new learn guides — Solana Blinks & Actions (~3000 words, 9 sections) and NFTFi Guide (~3500 words, 9 sections). Both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.
COMMUNITY-V4 OUTPUT: 6 social posts + 5-part institutional thread (Morgan Stanley MSBT), 2 SVG social cards, Discord/TG announcement, newsletter section. Content calendar set for Mar 23-29.
EOD-V5 FINDING: Uncommitted files at 1,145 (up from 650 in prior cycle — 76% increase). 42 TS errors in 2 files masked by ignoreBuildErrors.
PUBLISHED SLUGS: 431 declared in PUBLISHED_PAGES. ~315 in production (last deploy Mar 17, e999560). Gap: ~116 pages invisible to Google.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 4+ items pending promotion including decentralized-gpu-compute-guide-2026, cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026, bitcoin-supply-shock-guide-2026 + new Solana Blinks & NFTFi.
SEO RISK: 8 days without deploy. Production drift at 1,145 files. Every hour without deploy = more stale production content.
MARKET CONTEXT: BTC $68,302, ETH $2,057, SOL $88.55. Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear). Iran deadline expired Mar 23. Morgan Stanley MSBT S-1 filed Mar 20 — $160B potential demand signal.
API HEALTH: All 6 core routes present with cache headers. Rate limiter still unwired (38+ cycles). defi-yields fallback still missing.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: DONE SINCE STANDUP v5: Build-v5 (Solana Blinks + NFTFi guides), publish-v3 (queue check), community-v4 (MSBT social campaign + 2 SVG cards), design-v4 (audit), eod-v5 (full QA cycle). 5 agents, ~$452 human-equivalent.

TODAY'S CUMULATIVE OUTPUT: 10+ learn guides built, 7 pages promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES, 4+ OG images, 10+ social posts + 4 SVG cards, 5 QA cycles, 4 design audits, 27 agent runs across ~4.5 rotations. ZERO deployed to production.
BLOCKER [P0 — 8 DAYS]: Git locks (.git/HEAD.lock + .git/index.lock) since Mar 16. Blocks ALL commits and deploys. Resolution: rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock
BLOCKER [P1]: 2 pages (smart-contract-security, onchain-identity) still missing StructuredData/Breadcrumb/BackToTop components.
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 38+ CYCLES]: /api/defi-yields returns 500 on upstream failure (no fallback data).
CARRY-OVER [P1 — 38+ CYCLES]: Rate limiter not wired on any of 6 core API routes.
CARRY-OVER [P2]: 103 orphan slugs, ignoreBuildErrors masking 42 TS errors, cache header inconsistency on 4/6 API routes.
WARNING: Vercel '2 days left' flagged in prior eod cycle — may have expired. Requires Jefe's verification.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — CLEAR GIT LOCKS AND DEPLOY: 8 days blocked. ~1,145 uncommitted files, ~4,500+ insertions at risk. rm .git/index.lock .git/HEAD.lock → commit → push → verify Vercel. Nothing else matters until this is done.
PRIORITY 2 — VERIFY VERCEL ACCOUNT STATUS: Prior cycle flagged '2 days left' warning. If Vercel expired, deploy pipeline is broken even after git locks clear. Jefe must check.

PRIORITY 3 — ZERO NEW CONTENT: 431+ slugs declared, ~315 in production. Content pipeline has outrun shipping by 116+ pages. Halt all build cycles until production catches up. Marginal value of next build = $0.

STRATEGIC NOTE: Full rotation ($497 human-equivalent) ran since last standup. Production saw zero of it. 27 total agent runs today ($2,319) — all accumulating local debt. Shift entire agent budget to ops/deploy/fix until git locks clear.
